form.formComment: Useful gelding. Resumes off a 37 day letup. Last run finished 20th of 22 starters at Cheltenham on March 10 over 3319m, 56 len behind Saratoga carrying 71.5kg at $29. Before that finished seventh of 10 runners at Cheltenham in the G2 Finesse Juvenile Novices' Hurdle on January 24 over 3419m, slow track; 25 len behind Maestro Conti carrying 70kg at $5. Likely to figure on his best form.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after having raced just once last campaign finished 11th of 18 runners at Leopardstown in the LR on February 1 over 3621m, on heavy track; 16 len behind Cousin Kate carrying 67kg at $34. First up last campaign finished eighth of 14 runners at Leopardstown on March 3 2025 over 3218m, 8 len behind Moon Eclipse with 75kg at $9.50. Must include among the chances.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last preparation 4 of 20 runners at Down Royal January 20 over 3419m, 15 len behind Green Hope with 71.5kg at $5.50. When resuming last campaign 4 of 25 starters at Navan December 6 over 3218m, 23 len behind Saint Baco with 73kg at $13. Makes strong appeal.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after five months won by 1.0 len this track on March 22 over 3218m slow going defeating Malikanna with 73.5kg at $26 in a hurdle. Previously second-up finished eighth of 16 runners at Roscommon on October 13 over 2414m, on slow going 23 len behind Nancee Spain carrying 60.5kg at $12. Fitter for run. Key runner - don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Freshened for 40 days. Last run finished sixth of 11 starters at Gowran Park on March 7 over 3218m, on a wet track; 29 len behind Royal Soldier with 72.5kg at $4. Race before finished fifth of 16 runners at Naas on February 22 over 3118m, on rain affected going; 9 len behind Give Him A Chance with 63.5kg at $10. Won't find this easy.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation 5 of 15 starters at Thurles November 20 over 3721m, 13 len behind Stoneyford Lady carrying 66kg at $13. First up last campaign 2 of 17 runners at Cork July 11 over 4023m, 2.5 len behind Nytol carrying 66kg at $23. Harder here and happy to risk fresh in this line-up.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming finished fourth of 18 runners at Gowran Park on March 7 over 3218m, in the wet; 35 len behind Minella Boss with 75.5kg at $15. Second-up finished second of 13 starters at Clonmel on April 2 over 3218m, slow track; 1.0 len behind Blue Train with 71kg at $8. Fitter now and making headway every start. Can return to winning ways.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 56 day letup. Last outing finished second in a small field at Thurles in the LR on February 19 over 4325m, 16 len behind Karia Des Blaises carrying 66.5kg at $41. Start before finished fourth of 10 starters at Thurles on February 5 over 3621m, on slow going 35 len behind Salvator Mundi carrying 71kg at $67. Not going well enough. Others make more appeal.
